message:
style(ft-xbnl0.2.4): cargo fmt on tick 387 + tick 378 additions (tick 395)

Running cargo fmt --check on session files revealed rustfmt
reshape preferences on the ticks 387 (ft-l9mxa fix) + 378
(expired-budget snapshot) additions:

distributed.rs (ft-l9mxa race_with_cx_cancel helper):
- `Output = Result<...>` type constraint reshaped to indent under
  the `Future<` binding.
- `Err::<_, _>(ClientError::Cancelled)` call reshaped from
  multi-line to single-line.

runtime_compat.rs (tick 378 budget test):
- `Budget::new().with_deadline(...)` chain reshaped to a single
  expression on the right-hand side.
- `timeout_with_cx(...)` multi-arg call reshaped.

Ran check script after fmt — all 6 runs still PASS, 83/83 tests.
No semantic changes, only rustfmt preferences.

Session files are now fully fmt-clean per the tick-355 preemptive
format approach + ongoing fmt maintenance.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
